summary: Tested P1 features: Daily Prompt streak tracking and Sweetener Payments UI. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All streak and sweetener UI components verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns 200 for valid user
GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns streak, longest_streak, username fields
Streak values are integers >= 0
GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns 404 for nonexistent user
Streak endpoint works without authentication (public data)
POST /api/trades/{id}/pay-sweetener returns 404 for invalid trade ID
POST /api/trades/{id}/pay-sweetener endpoint exists (not 405)
POST /api/wax-reports/generate includes weekly_prompt_streak field
GET /api/wax-reports/latest includes weekly_prompt_streak field
GET /api/trades returns 200
Trade structure includes boot_amount and boot_direction fields
GET /api/prompts/today includes streak field
GET /api/users/{username} profile endpoint accessible
Wax report includes closing_line field
Profile page shows streak counter with Flame icon when streak > 0
Streak counter shows correct value (1 Day Streak for demo user)
ProposeTradeModal shows SWEETENER section with explanation tooltip
ProposeTradeModal shows 4% fee calculation when amount entered ($100 = Fee: $4.00)
ProposeTradeModal shows recipient amount after fee ($100 - $4 = Recipient gets $96.00)
ProposeTradeModal has sweetener direction dropdown (You pay / They pay)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user with 1-day streak
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully verified: (1) Streak tracking: GET /api/prompts/streak/{username} returns streak and longest_streak, profile page shows streak counter with Flame icon in stats row when streak > 0, today's prompt includes streak. (2) Sweetener Payments: ProposeTradeModal shows SWEETENER section with 4% fee explanation, input for amount, direction dropdown, and live fee preview (Fee: $X.XX · Recipient gets $X.XX). POST /api/trades/{id}/pay-sweetener endpoint returns 404/400 for invalid trades as expected. (3) Wax Report: includes weekly_prompt_streak and closing_line with perfect streak mention. The streak nudge scheduler runs at 19:00 and 22:00 UTC.

sweetener_propose_modal.tooltip: A sweetener balances value between records. 4% platform fee applies to the sweetener amount only.
sweetener_propose_modal.direction_dropdown: You pay sweetener / They pay sweetener

sweetener_trade_card_badge.content: $X sweetener + 'you pay'/'they pay' label + 4% fee indicator
sweetener_trade_card_badge.status: VERIFIED IN CODE (no active trades with sweetener in test data)

sweetener_trade_detail_modal.content: Amount, payer, 4% fee breakdown, recipient gets amount
sweetener_trade_detail_modal.confirmation_dialog: window.confirm() on accept when sweetener present

pay_sweetener_endpoint.response: 404 for invalid trade, creates Stripe checkout session for valid ACCEPTED trade

wax_report_streak.closing_line: Adds 'and a perfect prompt streak to prove it' when streak >= 7

streak_nudge_scheduler.runs_at: 19:00 UTC (first nudge for streak >= 3) and 22:00 UTC (urgent nudge for streak >= 7)

mocked_api_note: Stripe sweetener payment creates checkout session URL but actual payment requires Stripe dashboard setup - MOCKED in that real charges won't process without Stripe configuration
